item.title: Design system / UI / aesthetic build: TYPE mode removed from mobile streamer pill — pill is now strictly URL-only per canon. Sit

item.title: Canon / memory write: Architecture clarified: glass pill is URL-only on both Mac and mobile streamer. Site typin
item.description: Architecture clarified: glass pill is URL-only on both Mac and mobile streamer. Site typing happens directly in fields via input-overlay tracking, never through the pill.
item.dc:creator: XEN
item.guid: 2026-04-29T23:11:45Z|Architecture clarified: glass pill is URL-only on both Mac and mobile streamer. Site typing happens

item.title: Canon / memory write: Locked: auto-manifest pillar. Xen does not wait for commands. Speech is the trigger; ambie
item.description: Locked: auto-manifest pillar. Xen does not wait for commands. Speech is the trigger; ambient mention = action. Three build tracks (audio bridge, input overlay, scroll fix) starting immediately as concurrent files.
